# Quartz Demo

This site is primarily a Quarto book. Quarto is the best fit for polished public pages, stable navigation, citations, and a clean academic presentation.

Quartz is different. It is better for a networked digital garden: short notes, backlinks, wiki-style links, previews, and a graph view.

## How the demo is integrated

The Quartz demo is built as a sidecar site and published inside the Quarto site at:

<https://rempsyc.github.io/research-ideas/garden-demo/>

In practice, this means the Quarto book can remain the main public site while selected Markdown notes can also be explored through Quartz.

## What to look for

- Graph view showing relationships among notes.
- Wiki-style links such as `[[reading-as-intervention]]`.
- Backlinks between connected notes.
- Shorter, more exploratory notes than the curated Quarto pages.

## Demo notes

The current demo includes:

- Reading as intervention
- Narrative transportation
- Common ingroup identity

Open the [Quartz garden demo](https://rempsyc.github.io/research-ideas/garden-demo/) after the GitHub Pages workflow has deployed.
